mapper.select:
SELECT SP.SALES_PROD_ID AS PRODUCT_NO, SP.PROD_NAME AS PRODUCT_NAME, SP.SALE_PRICE, SP.LIST_PRICE AS COST_PRICE, SP.VAT_RATE AS VAT_AMOUNT, SP.SALE_START_DT AS SALE_START_DATE, SP.SALE_END_DT AS SALE_END_DATE, SP.DISP_YN AS DISPLAY_YN, NULL AS SELLER_ID, NULL AS PRODUCT_SUMMARY, NULL AS MD_COMMENT, NULL AS DESCRIPTION, NULL AS PAYMENT_INFO, NULL AS SHIPPING_INFO, NULL AS EXCHANGE_RETURN_INFO, NULL AS REFUND_INFO, SP.REG_DT, SP.MOD_DT FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT SP
ORDER BY SP.SALES_PROD_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT P.SALES_PROD_ID AS PRODUCT_NO, P.PROD_NAME AS PRODUCT_NAME, P.SALE_PRICE, P.LIST_PRICE AS COST_PRICE, P.VAT_RATE AS VAT_AMOUNT, P.SALE_START_DT AS SALE_START_DATE, P.SALE_END_DT AS SALE_END_DATE, P.DISP_YN AS DISPLAY_YN, NULL AS SELLER_ID, NULL AS SELLER_NAME, NULL AS PRODUCT_SUMMARY, NULL AS MD_COMMENT, NULL AS DESCRIPTION, NULL AS PAYMENT_INFO, NULL AS SHIPPING_INFO, NULL AS EXCHANGE_RETURN_INFO, NULL AS REFUND_INFO, P.REG_DT, P.MOD_DT, -- 구성상품 정보 SPC.COMPONENT_PROD_ID AS COMPOSITION_ID, SPC.SALES_PROD_ID AS PRODUCT_NO, SPC.COMPONENT_PROD_ID AS BUNDLE_ID, SPC.COMP_QTY AS COMP_QTY, NULL AS SORT_ORDER, CP.PROD_NAME AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_NAME, CP.SALE_TYPE_CD AS BUNDLE_SALE_TYPE, ST.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_SALE_TYPE_NAME, CP.SALE_STATUS_CD AS BUNDLE_SALE_STATUS, SS.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_SALE_STATUS_NAME, CP.STORAGE_TYPE_CD AS BUNDLE_STORAGE_TYPE, STC.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, CP.PROCESS_TYPE_CD AS BUNDLE_PROCESS_TYPE, PTC.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, CP.SALE_DIV_CD AS BUNDLE_DIVISION_TYPE, DVC.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_DIVISION_TYPE_NAME, CP.SALE_PRICE AS BUNDLE_SALE_PRICE, CP.LIST_PRICE AS BUNDLE_COST_PRICE, CP.VAT_RATE AS BUNDLE_VAT_AMOUNT, CP.SALE_START_DT AS BUNDLE_SALE_START_DATE, CP.SALE_END_DT AS BUNDLE_SALE_END_DATE, CP.C_USE_YN AS BUNDLE_DISPLAY_YN, NULL AS BUNDLE_SELLER_ID, NULL AS BUNDLE_SELLER_NAME, CP.REG_DT AS BUNDLE_REG_DT, CP.MOD_DT AS BUNDLE_MOD_DT, -- 이미지 정보 PI.IMG_ID AS IMAGE_ID, PI.SALES_PROD_ID AS IMAGE_PRODUCT_NO, PI.FILE_TYPE_CD AS IMAGE_TYPE, PI.IMG_URL AS IMAGE_PATH, PI.FILE_NAME AS ORIGINAL_NAME, PI.SORT_ORD AS IMAGE_SORT_ORDER FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP SPC ON P.SALES_PROD_ID = SPC.SALES_PROD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COMPONENT_PROD CP ON SPC.COMPONENT_PROD_ID = CP.COMPONENT_PROD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST ON CP.SALE_TYPE_CD = ST.CODE AND ST.GROUP_CODE = 'SALE_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_CODE SS ON CP.SALE_STATUS_CD = SS.CODE AND SS.GROUP_CODE = 'SALE_STATUS' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE STC ON CP.STORAGE_TYPE_CD = STC.DETAIL_CODE AND STC.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND STC.CODE = '001001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE PTC ON CP.PROCESS_TYPE_CD = PTC.DETAIL_CODE AND PTC.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND PTC.CODE = '001003' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE DVC ON CP.SALE_DIV_CD = DVC.DETAIL_CODE AND DVC.GROUP_CODE = '007' AND DVC.CODE = '007002' LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT_IMAGE PI ON P.SALES_PROD_ID = PI.SALES_PROD_ID WHERE P.SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} ORDER BY SPC.COMPONENT_PROD_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT ( PROD_NAME, SALE_PRICE, LIST_PRICE, VAT_RATE, SALE_START_DT, SALE_END_DT, DISP_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( CONCAT('SP', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), FLOOR(RAND()*1000)), -- 임시 코드 생성 #{productName}, #{salePrice}, #{costPrice}, #{vatRate}, #{saleStartDate}, #{saleEndDate}, #{displayYn}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{modId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT SET PROD_NAME = #{productName}, SALE_PRICE = #{salePrice}, LIST_PRICE = #{costPrice}, VAT_RATE = #{vatAmount}, SALE_START_DT = #{saleStartDate}, SALE_END_DT = #{saleEndDate}, DISP_YN = #{displayYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP ( SALES_PROD_ID, COMPONENT_PROD_ID, COMP_QTY, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{bundleId}, #{compQty}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{modId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_IMAGE ( SALES_PROD_ID, IMG_URL, SORT_ORDER, IS_MAIN_YN, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{salesProdId}, #{imgUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{isMainYn}, 'Y', #{regId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT IMG_ID as imgId, SALES_PROD_ID as salesProdId, IMG_URL as imgUrl, SORT_ORDER as sortOrder, IS_MAIN_YN as isMainYn FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
